Convert a loom file to h5mu format

Source: R/StreamHDF5.R
LoomToH5MU.Rd

Converts via streaming: loom -> h5seurat (temp) -> h5mu. Creates a single-modality h5mu file.

Usage

LoomToH5MU(
  source,
  dest,
  assay = "RNA",
  overwrite = FALSE,
  gzip = 4L,
  verbose = TRUE,
  stream = TRUE
)

Arguments

source

Path to input .loom file

dest

Path for output .h5mu file

assay

Assay name (default: "RNA")

overwrite

If TRUE, overwrite existing output

gzip

Gzip compression level (0-9)

verbose

Show progress messages

stream

If TRUE (default), use streaming. If FALSE, load into R.

Value

Invisibly returns dest
